scripts.deploy_localnet: sui client switch --env localnet && cross-env NETWORK=localnet MVR_FALLBACK_NETWORK=testnet pnpm tsx ./src/scripts/deploy.ts && pnpm sync_dapp_env_localnet
scripts.deploy_devnet: sui client switch --env devnet && cross-env NETWORK=devnet MVR_FALLBACK_NETWORK=testnet pnpm tsx ./src/scripts/deploy.ts && pnpm sync_dapp_env_devnet
scripts.deploy_testnet: sui client switch --env testnet && cross-env NETWORK=testnet pnpm tsx ./src/scripts/deploy.ts && pnpm sync_dapp_env_testnet
scripts.deploy_mainnet: sui client switch --env mainnet && cross-env NETWORK=mainnet pnpm tsx ./src/scripts/deploy.ts && pnpm sync_dapp_env_mainnet
